title: Bohemian Macrame flower wreath
excerpt: Combine traditional wall hanging design with macrame techniques for beautiful flower art.

steps.title: Wrap the hoop
steps.description: Completely wrap your hoop with cord, securing ends with glue.

steps.title: Create the web
steps.description: Attach a lace doily in the center or weave a web pattern with thin cord.

steps.title: Add macrame elements
steps.description: Attach cords at the bottom and create hanging elements with knots and fringe.

steps.title: Decorate
steps.description: Add feathers, beads, and additional macrame details to complete the piece.

tips: Vintage doilies from thrift stores make beautiful centerpieces
Create macrame feathers to use instead of real ones
